overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person walk through the Lemoyne Mining and Coal Company facility. The player moves through a muddy industrial yard as a steam locomotive passes by, then continues under wooden trestles and past freight cars in a foggy, overcast atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial mining company courtyard with train tracks

events.description: worker in flat cap walks from right to left across the muddy yard
steam locomotive begins moving from the background on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy industrial courtyard toward the mining facility main building

notable_agents.action: worker in period clothing walking from right to left across the path

entered.detail: large red industrial building with white trim and Lemoyne Mining and Coal Company signage
white wooden bridge structure with truss supports connecting building sections
small wooden building with external staircase on the left side
metal rails embedded in the muddy ground running through the yard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the Lemoyne Mining and Coal Company facility, a muddy industrial courtyard surrounded by red wooden buildings. The camera walks forward as a worker crosses from right to left, and a steam locomotive becomes visible moving in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: train tracks passing through industrial yard

events.description: steam locomotive moves past from right to left, emitting black smoke

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the moving train, tracking the locomotive as it passes through the yard

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive numbered 376 moving slowly on tracks from right to left with engineer visible in cab

entered.detail: black steam engine with yellow stripes and number 376 on the side
dark green coal tender car with Lemoyne lettering in yellow

segments.scene_description: The steam locomotive emerges from behind the building and moves past the camera, which tracks alongside it. The large black engine with yellow accents dominates the view as it travels leftward, followed by the coal tender, while the mining building recedes to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath the coal company trestle

events.description: moving underneath the wooden trestle structure into a covered, shadowed area

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive wooden support structures, passing stationary freight cars on the right

entered.detail: massive wooden beams with metal bands supporting the overhead trestle structure
rusted brown boxcars sitting on side tracks under the cover
steep wooden staircase leading up to the building platform on the right

segments.scene_description: After the train passes, the camera moves underneath the wooden trestle into a dimly lit, covered area. Massive wooden support pillars line the path while rusted freight cars sit on side tracks to the right, and the mining building looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer freight yard with parked boxcars

events.description: exiting the covered structure into the open freight yard with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking past stationary boxcars toward the edge of the facility where the yard opens up

entered.detail: old wooden freight wagon with large spoked wheels and barrel cargo
grassy clearing with trees and hills visible beyond the facility fence

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the trestle into the outer freight yard, where the sky is fully visible again. Stationary boxcars line the left side while a wooden freight wagon sits on the right, with open fields and forest visible in the distance beyond the industrial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a muddy industrial courtyard that transitions from the activity of a passing train into the shadowed depths of a mining facility. It begins by moving forward through the Lemoyne Mining and Coal Company yard, passing a worker as a steam locomotive appears in the background. As the large black and yellow engine emerges from behind a red wooden building, the camera tracks alongside the moving locomotive and its coal tender. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit, covered area beneath a wooden trestle, where the camera passes massive support pillars and rusted freight cars. Finally, the view emerges from the shadows back into the open freight yard, moving past stationary boxcars toward a distant horizon of open fields and forest.
